1) Click \"Open authorization page\" and: 1) Click "Open authorization page" and complete login. 2) Your browser may redirect to localhost (it is OK if the page does not load). 3) Copy the full URL from the address bar and paste it below. 4) Click "Generate credential".
Add custom iframe pages to the top navig: Add custom iframe pages to the top navigation. Each page can be set as visible to regular users or administrators.
Bot Token and chatId are required: Bot Token and chatId are required
Custom pages load with the highest brows: Custom pages load with the highest browser privileges. Only configure URLs you trust.
Generate a Codex OAuth credential and pa: Generate a Codex OAuth credential and paste it into the channel key field.
No custom menus yet. Click \"Add menu it: No custom menus yet. Click "Add menu item" to create one.
Password must be between 8 and 20 charac: Password must be between 8 and 20 characters
Paste the full callback URL (includes co: Paste the full callback URL (includes code & state)
Please manually copy and open the author: Please manually copy and open the authorization link
Please select both current and compare p: Please select both current and compare periods
Removes Midjourney flags such as --fast,: Removes Midjourney flags such as --fast, --relax, and --turbo from user prompts.
Required to expose Midjourney-style imag: Required to expose Midjourney-style image generation to end users.
Selected groups will be tried in order i: Selected groups will be tried in order if the current group fails.
Static token used to authenticate reques: Static token used to authenticate requests to /openapi/* routes. Leave blank to keep the existing value. Clear by saving an empty value (will disable /openapi/* access).
The page may have been deleted or disabl: The page may have been deleted or disabled by an administrator.
Tip: The generated key is a JSON credent: Tip: The generated key is a JSON credential including access_token / refresh_token / account_id.
